channel.title: SP Productions Daily
channel.description: Daily shows from SP Productions. AI and Tech News Cast with Daxon Caine, three times daily.
channel.itunes:author: SP Productions
channel.itunes:summary: AI and Tech News Cast with Daxon Caine. Morning, Midday, and Evening editions covering AI models, business, developer tools, culture, and travel.

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-02
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: Anthropic issues copyright takedown requests to remove 8,000+ copies of Claude Code source code; Updates for ChatGPT; Fascinating story: Tech Entrepreneur in Australia, using ChatGPT, AlphaFold, and a custom made mRNA ; Announcement: Temporary LLM Content Ban; A bug in Bun may have been the root cause of the Claude Code source code leak. | Business: U.S President defunding of NPR and PBS blocked by judge, but damage is already done | Judge invalida; This Startup Catches Fraud at Scale; Inside The Startup Reinventing The $6 Trillion Chemical Manufacturing Industry | Dev Tools: Gabe Newell "stepped back" from making games at Valve after Portal 2 because everyone kept agreeing ; Chinese state media releases episode 2 of their AI generated Iran war animated series; Mark Zuckerberg, Larry Ellison, and Jensen Huang appointed to President's Council of Advisors on Sci; Demis Hassabis secretly built a hedge fund inside DeepMind trying to beat Jim Simons. Google shut it; Upgraded the budget homelab and decided to make a couple stickers for it | Culture: I asked Chat to make a photo of a college party in 2004 taken on a flip phone; Sora 2 megathread (part 3) | Wild Card: US patent office revokes Nintendo’s patent on summoning characters to make them battle | VGC; The era of human coding is over; I built a fully local, open-source thermal printer appliance - no cloud, no subscriptions, no accoun; Iran War Chokes Off Helium Supply Critical for AI; I'm a server
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-02

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-02
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: Updates for ChatGPT; Announcement: Temporary LLM Content Ban; The Bonsai 1-bit models are very good; GPT-4o/GPT-5 complaints megathread | Business: This Startup Catches Fraud at Scale; Inside The Startup Reinventing The $6 Trillion Chemical Manufacturing Industry | Dev Tools: Gabe Newell "stepped back" from making games at Valve after Portal 2 because everyone kept agreeing ; Chinese state media releases episode 2 of their AI generated Iran war animated series; Mark Zuckerberg, Larry Ellison, and Jensen Huang appointed to President's Council of Advisors on Sci; Upgraded the budget homelab and decided to make a couple stickers for it | Culture: Sora 2 megathread (part 3) | Wild Card: Group Pushing Age Verification Requirements for AI Turns Out to Be Sneakily Backed by OpenAI; I'm a server; The era of human coding is over; I built a fully local, open-source thermal printer appliance - no cloud, no subscriptions, no accoun; Nvidia market share in China falls to less than 60% — Chinese chip makers deliver 1.65 million AI GP
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-02

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-02
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: Updates for ChatGPT; Announcement: Temporary LLM Content Ban; [hackernews] Google releases Gemma 4 open models; [hackernews] Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards Real World Agents | Business: The US Burned 14 Years of Missiles in 30 Days; AI tractor startup collapses after burning $240M, laying off entire staff; YouTube CEO responds to concerns as big creators leave for Netflix & Amazon; Tesla's stock drops more than 4% on disappointing deliveries report | Dev Tools: your CI/CD pipeline probably ran malware on march 31st between 00:21 and 03:15 UTC. here's how to ch; Can finally be one of the cool kids.; <Generic vague question about obscure DevOps related pain point and asking how others are handlin; FAKKU DMCAed LANraragi, one of the most popular open-sourced self-hosted manga/doujinshi reader beca | Culture: LTX Desktop 1.0.3 is live! Now runs on 16 GB VRAM machines; If this is in Greece wouldn’t it cost multiple days of working to pay for a human to make this?; just let her look?..; Mommy Blue Checkmark is fighting with Daddy Blue Checkmark over what their Child Blue Checkmark made | Wild Card: Group Pushing Age Verification Requirements for AI Turns Out to Be Sneakily Backed by OpenAI; I'm a server; The era of human coding is over; 😭😭
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-02
